steps: Go to https://app.datadoghq.com and sign in or create a free Datadog account
Navigate to Organization Settings > API Keys (or go directly to https://app.datadoghq.com/organization-settings/api-keys)
Click the 'New Key' button in the top-right corner
Enter a name for the API key and click 'Create Key'
Copy the API key value immediately — it is shown only once (One-Time Read mode is enabled by default for new accounts)
Optionally, create an Application Key at https://app.datadoghq.com/organization-settings/application-keys for operations that require app-level auth

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Datadog API key, sent as the DD-API-KEY header on every request

credential_fields.name: app_key
credential_fields.label: Application Key (optional)
credential_fields.description: Required for some management operations. Sent as DD-APPLICATION-KEY header. Create at Organization Settings > Application Keys.

notes: Free trial available with 14 days full access; after trial some features require a paid plan
API keys are shown only once at creation — save immediately (One-Time Read mode enabled by default since August 2025)
Most read operations only require DD-API-KEY; some management endpoints also require DD-APPLICATION-KEY
The default API host is https://api.datadoghq.com — EU users should use https://api.datadoghq.eu
Rate limits vary by plan; free/trial accounts have lower limits

test_endpoint.description: Validate the DD-API-KEY header — returns {"valid": true} if the key is correct
